Screen a Candidate

Knowledge Base — SelectionRules

Rule-based engine that powers the AI screening system

RULE 1

Skill Requirement

IF candidate has skill
"Python" / "Java" / "SQL"
/ "React" / "Machine Learning"

THEN → meets skill requirement
RULE 2

Experience Requirement

IF experience_years >= 2

THEN → meets experience requirement
RULE 3

Academic Requirement

IF GPA >= 3.0

THEN → meets academic requirement
RULE 4

Certification Advantage

IF certification = "AWS"
OR "Google Cloud"

THEN → receives higher score (+15)

⚖️ Final Shortlisting Rule

IF   Rule 1 (skill) is satisfied
AND  experience_years >= 2
AND  GPA >= 3.0

THEN → candidate is SHORTLISTED
ELSE → candidate is REJECTED

📐 Scoring Breakdown

Required Skill  +30
Experience ≥ 2 yrs  +25
GPA ≥ 3.0  +25
AWS / Google Cloud cert  +15
Relevant degree  +5
Max possible: 100
